parameters.title: Quote follow-up: {{$json.firstName}} {{$json.lastName}} - {{$json.coverageLabel}}
parameters.notes: New quote request. Coverage: {{$json.coverageLabel}}. State: {{$json.state}}. Age: {{$json.age}}. Schedule discovery call to discuss needs and provide accurate quotes.

parameters.subject: ={{$json.coverageLabel}} Quote Request Received - Buckalew Financial
parameters.html:
Thank You for Your Quote Request!

Hi {{$json.firstName}},

We've received your request for a {{$json.coverageLabel}} quote{{$json.state ? ' in ' + (($json.state == 'FL' ? 'Florida' : $json.state == 'TX' ? 'Texas' : $json.state) + '' : ''}}.

A licensed agent will review your request and reach out within 24 business hours with personalized options.

What Happens Next:

  1. 📞 An agent will call to understand your specific needs
  2. 📊 We'll find the best plans that match your situation
  3. 📋 You'll receive 3-5 competitive quotes to compare

No pressure, no spam — just helpful guidance.

In the meantime, feel free to explore:

  • {{$json.coverageLabel}} Guide
  • Free Resources

Warm regards,
The Buckalew Financial Team
Licensed in FL, TX, CA, NC, SC, MI | W248767

parameters.subject: ={{$json.coverageLabel}} Quote Request Received - Buckalew Financial
parameters.html:
Thank You for Your Quote Request

Hi {{$json.firstName}},

We've received your request, but unfortunately we are not yet licensed in your state ({{$json.state}}).

We're expanding! Enter your email below and we'll notify you the moment we become available in your area.

[Sign up for updates]

Warm regards,
The Buckalew Financial Team
